mapper.select: SELECT ch.* FROM chat_history ch INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MAX(created_at) as max_time FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY session_id ) latest ON ch.session_id = latest.session_id AND ch.created_at = latest.max_time ORDER BY latest.max_time DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_history WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_history (user_id, session_id, role, content, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO chat_history (user_id, session_id, role, content, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
